name: talkpool-dashboard
description: Talkpool Telecom KPI Dashboard - Full Stack

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm start --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.desktop: npm run build:app && npm start --prefix backend
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build:app && cd electron && npm start
scripts.build:exe: npm run build:app && cd electron && npm install && npm run rebuild && npm run build
